title: A-Macing Datapack
description: This datapack improves upon the new weapon the Mace, from the 1.21 update. There are three new variants of the mace, gold, emerald, and diamond.
body:
![The title of the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0337db73b066ab8b820c2c08aabc6c69879e68e.png)

This datapack builds off the idea of the brand new feature called the mace. This datapack adds three brand new variants of said item. These varients are gold, emerald, and diamond.

The gold variant allows the player to bonce off of entities, making it easier to make combos.

Here's the recipe:

![recipe yippe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62168979eaec3212f20cdc8e586de6f24ad5c817.png)

The emerald variant allows player to use kinetic energy with elytra's to kill enemies safely, it also allows for combat advantages making you take less damage.

Here's the recipe:

![recipe :O](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e77f4cfde06160b5a43869acc158a6ad3542de6.png)

The diamond variant allows the player to use both abilities on the same item.

Here's the recipe:

![recipe yarp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32bc8aee4e1f08f9e5d627ce60ca9004c5e0008c.png)

Use the deactivated mace to activate to turn into the diamond variant.
